---
title: "109-GWAS-residency"
output: html_document
date: "2026-01-09"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning=FALSE, message=FALSE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

can we look at a continuous time variable and genetic background
```{r}
time<-read_csv("meta/Barra_genomics_52shortlist_rich.csv")
time<-time %>% select(FishID, FW_residency) %>% na.omit()
```


```{r}
m<-read_csv(file="meta/m52.csv") %>% filter(!specimen_id %in% c("SFLc0316","SFLc0625","SFLc0592")) %>%
  mutate(NewPheno=ifelse(specimen_id=="SFLc0427", "1",Pheno)) %>% mutate(NewPhenotype=ifelse(specimen_id=="SFLc0427", "SFF",Phenotype))

m2<-time %>% left_join(m, by=c("FishID"="specimen_id")) %>% filter(Coverage>5)
```

```{r}
m2 %>% select(Path) %>% write_tsv(col_names = FALSE, file="bamlists/22.bamlist")
m2 %>% select(FW_residency) %>% write_tsv(col_names = FALSE, file="bamlists/22.pheno")

m2 %>% filter(FW_residency >1)
ggplot(m2) +
  geom_histogram(aes(x=FW_residency))
```


```{sh, eval=FALSE}
srun -t 24:00:00 -p bmh --mem=32G --nodes=1 --ntasks-per-node=1 --cpus-per-task=12 $HOME/angsd/angsd -P 12 \
 -doAsso 2 -doPost 1 -yQuant $HOME/barra-lh/bamlists/22.pheno -GL 1 -minInd 21 -minMaf 0.05 \
 -minMapQ 20 -minQ 20 \
 -doMajorMinor 1 -doMaf 1 -SNP_pval 1e-6 -rf meta/lates-lgs.txt -out outputs/109/combined-asso-95 \
 -bam $HOME/barra-lh/bamlists/22.bamlist  > outputs/109/combined-asso.out 2> outputs/109/combined-asso.err &
```


What did we get out of the deal?
NC_066849.1	21944550	A	G	0.318183	22	10.189332	10/10/2
NC_066849.1	21944925	C	G	0.318182	22	10.189356	10/10/2
NC_066849.1	21946084	A	G	0.318182	22	10.189357	10/10/2
NC_066851.1	23875900	A	G	0.318201	22	10.191175	10/10/2
NC_066841.1	15499337	G	A	0.319296	22	10.964723	10/10/2
NC_066847.1	15754278	T	G	0.311554	22	11.014222	10/10/1
NC_066840.1	4928051	A	G	0.311547	22	11.014447	10/10/1
NC_066841.1	15501585	A	T	0.319133	22	11.118839	10/10/2
NC_066848.1	522217	C	T	0.318213	22	11.147074	10/10/2
NC_066850.1	14882805	G	A	0.318189	22	11.147961	10/10/2
NC_066841.1	298579	C	T	0.318181	22	11.148079	10/10/2
NC_066836.1	21212096	T	A	0.318161	22	11.148528	10/10/2
NC_066841.1	16600816	T	A	0.316719	22	11.375089	10/10/2
NC_066847.1	16752411	G	A	0.318276	22	12.165025	10/10/2
NC_066833.1	19895264	C	T	0.316407	22	12.291709	10/10/2
